          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport asyncio\nimport logging\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\nfrom datetime import datetime\n\nfrom prometheus_client import start_http_server\n\nfrom miniq.observability.logging import get_logger\nfrom miniq.observability.metrics import scheduler_enqueues_total\nfrom miniq.runtime import Runtime, build_runtime\nfrom miniq.scheduler.config import ScheduleConfig, ScheduleDefinition, load_schedule_config\nfrom miniq.services import JobService\nfrom miniq.utils import utc_now\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=REDACTED SchedulerService:\n    runtime: Runtime\n    logger: logging.LoggerAdapter[logging.Logger]\n    job_service: JobService\n    _startup_time: datetime = field(init=REDACTED    _schedule_config: ScheduleConfig = field(init=REDACTED    def __post_init__(self) -> None:\n        self._startup_time = utc_now()\n        self._schedule_config = load_schedule_config(self.runtime.settings.scheduler_config_path)\n        for schedule in self._schedule_config.schedules:\n            if schedule.type not in self.runtime.tasks.names:\n                msg = f\"unknown scheduled task type: {schedule.type}\"\n                raise ValueError(msg)\n            self.runtime.tasks.validate_payload(schedule.type, schedule.payload)\n\n    async def run(self) -> None:\n        start_http_server(self.runtime.settings.scheduler_metrics_port)\n        self.logger.info(\"scheduler starting\")\n        while True:\n            try:\n                await self.job_service.reconcile_due_jobs(\n                    limit=REDACTED                )\n                await self._emit_due_schedule_jobs()\n                await asyncio.sleep(self.runtime.settings.scheduler_interval_seconds)\n            except asyncio.CancelledError:\n                raise\n            except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\n                self.logger.exception(\"scheduler loop failed\")\n                await asyncio.sleep(1.0)\n\n    async def _emit_due_schedule_jobs(self) -> None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        for schedule in self._schedule_config.schedules:\n            for planned_time in await self._due_ticks(schedule, now=REDACTED                job = await self.runtime.repository.create_schedule_job(\n                    schedule_id=REDACTED,\n                    schedule=REDACTED,\n                    planned_time=REDACTED,\n                    queue=REDACTED,\n                    job_type=REDACTED,\n                    payload=REDACTED,\n                    max_attempts=REDACTED,\n                )\n                if job is None:\n                    continue\n                scheduler_enqueues_total.labels(schedule_id=REDACTED                await self.job_service.try_enqueue(job)\n                self.logger.info(\n                    \"scheduled job emitted\",\n                    extra=REDACTED                        \"schedule_id\": schedule.id,\n                        \"job_id\": job.id,\n                        \"queue\": job.queue,\n                    },\n                )\n\n    async def _due_ticks(self, schedule: ScheduleDefinition, *, now: datetime) -> list[datetime]:\n        last_tick = await self.runtime.repository.get_last_schedule_tick(schedule_id=REDACTED        base = self._startup_time if last_tick is None else last_tick\n        if base.tzinfo is None and now.tzinfo is not None:\n            base = base.replace(tzinfo=REDACTED        next_tick = schedule.next_after(base)\n        if next_tick.tzinfo is None and now.tzinfo is not None:\n            next_tick = next_tick.replace(tzinfo=REDACTED        due: list[datetime] = []\n        while next_tick <= now:\n            due.append(next_tick)\n            next_tick = schedule.next_after(next_tick)\n            if next_tick.tzinfo is None and now.tzinfo is not None:\n                next_tick = next_tick.replace(tzinfo=REDACTED        return due\n\n\nasync def run_scheduler(runtime: Runtime | None = None) -> None:\n    resolved_runtime = runtime or build_runtime(service=REDACTED\"scheduler\")\n    await resolved_runtime.initialize()\n    try:\n        logger = get_logger(\"miniq.scheduler\", service=REDACTED\"scheduler\")\n        job_service = JobService(\n            repository=REDACTED,\n            broker=REDACTED,\n            tasks=REDACTED,\n            logger=REDACTED,\n        )\n        scheduler = SchedulerService(\n            runtime=REDACTED,\n            logger=REDACTED,\n            job_service=REDACTED,\n        )\n        await scheduler.run()\n    finally:\n        await resolved_runtime.close()\n\n\ndef main() -> None:\n    try:\n        asyncio.run(run_scheduler())\n    except KeyboardInterrupt:\n        return\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    main()\n"

          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import and_, desc, func, or_, select, update\nfrom sqlalchemy.exc import IntegrityError\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession, async_sessionmaker\n\nfrom miniq.db.models import Job, JobEvent, ScheduleTick\nfrom miniq.db.state_machine import require_transition\nfrom miniq.enums import ACTIVE_STATES, JobState\nfrom miniq.utils import new_job_id, utc_now\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True, frozen=REDACTED JobPage:\n    items: list[Job]\n    next_cursor: str | None\n\n\nclass JobRepository:\n    def __init__(self, session_factory: async_sessionmaker[AsyncSession]) -> None:\n        self._session_factory = session_factory\n\n    async def create_job(\n        self,\n        *,\n        job_id: str,\n        job_type: str,\n        queue: str,\n        payload: dict[str, Any],\n        max_attempts: int,\n        next_run_at: datetime,\n        idempotency_key: str | None,\n        schedule_id: str | None = None,\n        schedule: str | None = None,\n        message: str = \"job queued\",\n    ) -> Job:\n        now = utc_now()\n        job = Job(\n            id=REDACTED,\n            type=REDACTED,\n            queue=REDACTED,\n            payload=REDACTED,\n            state=REDACTED,\n            created_at=REDACTED,\n            updated_at=REDACTED,\n            idempotency_key=REDACTED,\n            attempts=REDACTED,\n            max_attempts=REDACTED,\n            next_run_at=REDACTED,\n            schedule_id=REDACTED,\n            schedule=REDACTED,\n        )\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            try:\n                async with session.begin():\n                    session.add(job)\n                    session.add(\n                        JobEvent(\n                            job_id=REDACTED,\n                            old_state=None,\n                            new_state=REDACTED,\n                            message=REDACTED,\n                            event_metadata=REDACTED\"queue\": queue, \"job_type\": job_type},\n                        )\n                    )\n            except IntegrityError:\n                await session.rollback()\n                raise\n            await session.refresh(job)\n            return job\n\n    async def get_job(self, job_id: str) -> Job | None:\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            return await session.get(Job, job_id)\n\n    async def get_active_job_by_idempotency_key(self, idempotency_key: str) -> Job | None:\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            stmt = (\n                select(Job)\n                .where(\n                    Job.idempotency_key == idempotency_key,\n                    Job.state.in_([state.value for state in ACTIVE_STATES]),\n                )\n                .order_by(desc(Job.created_at))\n                .limit(1)\n            )\n            return (await session.execute(stmt)).scalar_one_or_none()\n\n    async def list_jobs(\n        self,\n        *,\n        state: str | None,\n        job_type: str | None,\n        limit: int,\n        cursor_created_at: datetime | None,\n        cursor_id: str | None,\n    ) -> list[Job]:\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            stmt = select(Job)\n            if state is not None:\n                stmt = stmt.where(Job.state == state)\n            if job_type is not None:\n                stmt = stmt.where(Job.type == job_type)\n            if cursor_created_at is not None and cursor_id is not None:\n                stmt = stmt.where(\n                    or_(\n                        Job.created_at < cursor_created_at,\n                        and_(Job.created_at == cursor_created_at, Job.id < cursor_id),\n                    )\n                )\n            stmt = stmt.order_by(desc(Job.created_at), desc(Job.id)).limit(limit)\n            return list((await session.execute(stmt)).scalars().all())\n\n    async def list_events(\n        self,\n        *,\n        job_id: str | None,\n        after_id: int,\n        limit: int,\n    ) -> list[JobEvent]:\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            stmt = select(JobEvent).where(JobEvent.id > after_id)\n            if job_id is not None:\n                stmt = stmt.where(JobEvent.job_id == job_id)\n            stmt = stmt.order_by(JobEvent.id.asc()).limit(limit)\n            return list((await session.execute(stmt)).scalars().all())\n\n    async def mark_job_enqueued(self, *, job_id: str, stream_id: str) -> None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                await session.execute(\n                    update(Job)\n                    .where(Job.id == job_id, Job.broker_enqueued_at.is_(None))\n                    .values(broker_enqueued_at=REDACTED, updated_at=REDACTED, last_stream_id=REDACTED                )\n\n    async def get_due_unenqueued_jobs(self, *, now: datetime, limit: int) -> list[Job]:\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            stmt = (\n                select(Job)\n                .where(\n                    Job.state == JobState.QUEUED.value,\n                    Job.broker_enqueued_at.is_(None),\n                    Job.next_run_at <= now,\n                )\n                .order_by(Job.next_run_at.asc(), Job.created_at.asc())\n                .limit(limit)\n            )\n            return list((await session.execute(stmt)).scalars().all())\n\n    async def count_due_jobs_by_queue(self, *, now: datetime) -> list[tuple[str, int]]:\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            stmt = (\n                select(Job.queue, func.count(Job.id))\n                .where(\n                    Job.state == JobState.QUEUED.value,\n                    Job.next_run_at <= now,\n                )\n                .group_by(Job.queue)\n            )\n            rows = (await session.execute(stmt)).all()\n            return [(queue, count) for queue, count in rows]\n\n    async def claim_for_execution(\n        self, *, job_id: str, stream_id: str, consumer: str\n    ) -> Job | None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                claimed_job_id = (\n                    await session.execute(\n                        update(Job)\n                        .where(Job.id == job_id, Job.state == JobState.QUEUED.value)\n                        .values(\n                            state=REDACTED,\n                            attempts=REDACTED + 1,\n                            updated_at=REDACTED,\n                            last_stream_id=REDACTED,\n                        )\n                        .returning(Job.id)\n                    )\n                ).scalar_one_or_none()\n                if claimed_job_id is None:\n                    return None\n                job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\n                if job is None:\n                    return None\n                session.add(\n                    JobEvent(\n                        job_id=REDACTED,\n                        old_state=REDACTED,\n                        new_state=REDACTED,\n                        message=REDACTED\"job started\",\n                        event_metadata=REDACTED                            \"consumer\": consumer,\n                            \"stream_id\": stream_id,\n                            \"attempt\": job.attempts,\n                        },\n                    )\n                )\n            return job\n\n    async def reclaim_for_execution(\n        self, *, job_id: str, stream_id: str, consumer: str\n    ) -> Job | None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                reclaimed_job_id = (\n                    await session.execute(\n                        update(Job)\n                        .where(\n                            Job.id == job_id,\n                            Job.state == JobState.RUNNING.value,\n                            Job.last_stream_id == stream_id,\n                        )\n                        .values(\n                            attempts=REDACTED + 1,\n                            updated_at=REDACTED,\n                        )\n                        .returning(Job.id)\n                    )\n                ).scalar_one_or_none()\n                if reclaimed_job_id is None:\n                    return None\n                job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\n                if job is None:\n                    return None\n                session.add(\n                    JobEvent(\n                        job_id=REDACTED,\n                        old_state=REDACTED,\n                        new_state=REDACTED,\n                        message=REDACTED\"job reclaimed after visibility timeout\",\n                        event_metadata=REDACTED                            \"consumer\": consumer,\n                            \"stream_id\": stream_id,\n                            \"attempt\": job.attempts,\n                        },\n                    )\n                )\n            return job\n\n    async def complete_job(self, *, job_id: str, result_payload: dict[str, Any]) -> Job | None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\n                if job is None:\n                    return None\n                if job.state != JobState.RUNNING.value:\n                    return job\n                require_transition(JobState(job.state), JobState.SUCCEEDED)\n                old_state = job.state\n                job.state = JobState.SUCCEEDED.value\n                job.result = result_payload\n                job.last_error = None\n                job.updated_at = now\n                job.finished_at = now\n                job.cancel_requested = False\n                session.add(\n                    JobEvent(\n                        job_id=REDACTED,\n                        old_state=REDACTED,\n                        new_state=REDACTED,\n                        message=REDACTED\"job succeeded\",\n                        event_metadata=REDACTED\"result\": result_payload},\n                    )\n                )\n            return job\n\n    async def fail_and_requeue(\n        self,\n        *,\n        job_id: str,\n        error_message: str,\n        next_run_at: datetime,\n    ) -> Job | None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\n                if job is None or job.state != JobState.RUNNING.value:\n                    return job\n                require_transition(JobState(job.state), JobState.FAILED)\n                session.add(\n                    JobEvent(\n                        job_id=REDACTED,\n                        old_state=REDACTED,\n                        new_state=REDACTED,\n                        message=REDACTED\"job failed\",\n                        event_metadata=REDACTED\"error\": error_message, \"attempt\": job.attempts},\n                    )\n                )\n                require_transition(JobState.FAILED, JobState.QUEUED)\n                job.state = JobState.QUEUED.value\n                job.updated_at = now\n                job.next_run_at = next_run_at\n                job.last_error = error_message\n                job.result = None\n                job.broker_enqueued_at = None\n                job.last_stream_id = None\n                job.finished_at = None\n                session.add(\n                    JobEvent(\n                        job_id=REDACTED,\n                        old_state=REDACTED,\n                        new_state=REDACTED,\n                        message=REDACTED\"job requeued\",\n                        event_metadata=REDACTED\"next_run_at\": next_run_at.isoformat()},\n                    )\n                )\n            return job\n\n    async def mark_dead(self, *, job_id: str, error_message: str) -> Job | None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\n                if job is None:\n                    return None\n                if job.state != JobState.RUNNING.value:\n                    return job\n                require_transition(JobState(job.state), JobState.DEAD)\n                old_state = job.state\n                job.state = JobState.DEAD.value\n                job.last_error = error_message\n                job.updated_at = now\n                job.finished_at = now\n                job.broker_enqueued_at = None\n                job.last_stream_id = None\n                session.add(\n                    JobEvent(\n                        job_id=REDACTED,\n                        old_state=REDACTED,\n                        new_state=REDACTED,\n                        message=REDACTED\"job exhausted retries\",\n                        event_metadata=REDACTED\"error\": error_message, \"attempt\": job.attempts},\n                    )\n                )\n            return job\n\n    async def mark_running_canceled(self, *, job_id: str, message: str) -> Job | None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\n                if job is None:\n                    return None\n                if job.state != JobState.RUNNING.value:\n                    return job\n                require_transition(JobState(job.state), JobState.CANCELED)\n                old_state = job.state\n                job.state = JobState.CANCELED.value\n                job.updated_at = now\n                job.finished_at = now\n                job.cancel_requested = True\n                session.add(\n                    JobEvent(\n                        job_id=REDACTED,\n                        old_state=REDACTED,\n                        new_state=REDACTED,\n                        message=REDACTED,\n                        event_metadata=None,\n                    )\n                )\n            return job\n\n    async def cancel_job(self, *, job_id: str) -> Job | None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\n                if job is None:\n                    return None\n                if job.state == JobState.QUEUED.value:\n                    require_transition(JobState(job.state), JobState.CANCELED)\n                    old_state = job.state\n                    job.state = JobState.CANCELED.value\n                    job.updated_at = now\n                    job.finished_at = now\n                    job.cancel_requested = True\n                    session.add(\n                        JobEvent(\n                            job_id=REDACTED,\n                            old_state=REDACTED,\n                            new_state=REDACTED,\n                            message=REDACTED\"job canceled before execution\",\n                            event_metadata=None,\n                        )\n                    )\n                    return job\n                if job.state == JobState.RUNNING.value:\n                    job.cancel_requested = True\n                    job.updated_at = now\n                    session.add(\n                        JobEvent(\n                            job_id=REDACTED,\n                            old_state=REDACTED,\n                            new_state=REDACTED,\n                            message=REDACTED\"cancel requested\",\n                            event_metadata=None,\n                        )\n                    )\n                    return job\n                return job\n\n    async def retry_job(self, *, job_id: str, next_run_at: datetime) -> Job | None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\n                if job is None:\n                    return None\n                if job.state not in {JobState.FAILED.value, JobState.DEAD.value}:\n                    return job\n                require_transition(JobState(job.state), JobState.QUEUED)\n                old_state = job.state\n                job.state = JobState.QUEUED.value\n                job.attempts = 0\n                job.next_run_at = next_run_at\n                job.updated_at = now\n                job.finished_at = None\n                job.cancel_requested = False\n                job.result = None\n                job.last_error = None\n                job.broker_enqueued_at = None\n                job.last_stream_id = None\n                job.dlq_published_at = None\n                session.add(\n                    JobEvent(\n                        job_id=REDACTED,\n                        old_state=REDACTED,\n                        new_state=REDACTED,\n                        message=REDACTED\"manual retry queued\",\n                        event_metadata=REDACTED\"next_run_at\": next_run_at.isoformat()},\n                    )\n                )\n            return job\n\n    async def is_cancel_requested(self, *, job_id: str) -> bool:\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            stmt = select(Job.cancel_requested).where(Job.id == job_id)\n            value = (await session.execute(stmt)).scalar_one_or_none()\n            return bool(value)\n\n    async def mark_dlq_published(self, *, job_id: str) -> None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                await session.execute(\n                    update(Job)\n                    .where(Job.id == job_id, Job.dlq_published_at.is_(None))\n                    .values(dlq_published_at=REDACTED, updated_at=REDACTED                )\n\n    async def get_last_schedule_tick(self, *, schedule_id: str) -> datetime | None:\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            stmt = (\n                select(ScheduleTick.planned_time)\n                .where(ScheduleTick.schedule_id == schedule_id)\n                .order_by(ScheduleTick.planned_time.desc())\n                .limit(1)\n            )\n            return (await session.execute(stmt)).scalar_one_or_none()\n\n    async def create_schedule_job(\n        self,\n        *,\n        schedule_id: str,\n        schedule: str,\n        planned_time: datetime,\n        queue: str,\n        job_type: str,\n        payload: dict[str, Any],\n        max_attempts: int,\n    ) -> Job | None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        job = Job(\n            id=REDACTED,\n            type=REDACTED,\n            queue=REDACTED,\n            payload=REDACTED,\n            state=REDACTED,\n            created_at=REDACTED,\n            updated_at=REDACTED,\n            idempotency_key=None,\n            attempts=REDACTED,\n            max_attempts=REDACTED,\n            next_run_at=REDACTED,\n            schedule_id=REDACTED,\n            schedule=REDACTED,\n        )\n        tick = ScheduleTick(schedule_id=REDACTED, planned_time=REDACTED, job_id=REDACTED        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            try:\n                async with session.begin():\n                    session.add(tick)\n                    session.add(job)\n                    session.add(\n                        JobEvent(\n                            job_id=REDACTED,\n                            old_state=None,\n                            new_state=REDACTED,\n                            message=REDACTED\"recurring job queued\",\n                            event_metadata=REDACTED                                \"schedule_id\": schedule_id,\n                                \"planned_time\": planned_time.isoformat(),\n                            },\n                        )\n                    )\n            except IntegrityError:\n                await session.rollback()\n                return None\n            await session.refresh(job)\n            return job\n"
        },

          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom collections.abc import Awaitable, Callable\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any, cast\n\nfrom redis.asyncio import Redis\n\nfrom miniq.observability.metrics import jobs_enqueued_total\nfrom miniq.utils import utc_now\n\n\ndef stream_name(queue: str) -> str:\n    return f\"jobs:{queue}\"\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True, frozen=REDACTED StreamMessage:\n    queue: str\n    stream: str\n    stream_id: str\n    values: dict[str, str]\n\n\nclass RedisBroker:\n    def __init__(self, redis_client: Redis[Any], *, group_name: str) -> None:\n        self._redis = redis_client\n        self._group_name = group_name\n\n    async def ping(self) -> bool:\n        return bool(await self._redis.ping())\n\n    async def ensure_group(self, queue: str) -> None:\n        name = stream_name(queue)\n        try:\n            await self._redis.xgroup_create(\n                name=REDACTED, groupname=REDACTED, id=REDACTED\"0\", mkstream=REDACTED            )\n        except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001\n            if \"BUSYGROUP\" not in str(exc):\n                raise\n\n    async def enqueue(\n        self,\n        *,\n        queue: str,\n        job_id: str,\n        job_type: str,\n        enqueued_at: datetime | None = None,\n    ) -> str:\n        timestamp = (enqueued_at or utc_now()).isoformat()\n        message_id = await self._redis.xadd(\n            stream_name(queue),\n            {\n                \"job_id\": job_id,\n                \"queue\": queue,\n                \"type\": job_type,\n                \"enqueued_at\": timestamp,\n            },\n        )\n        jobs_enqueued_total.labels(type=REDACTED, queue=REDACTED        return cast(str, message_id)\n\n    async def publish_dlq(self, *, job_id: str, queue: str, job_type: str, reason: str) -> str:\n        return cast(\n            str,\n            await self._redis.xadd(\n                \"jobs:dlq\",\n                {\n                    \"job_id\": job_id,\n                    \"queue\": queue,\n                    \"type\": job_type,\n                    \"reason\": reason,\n                    \"published_at\": utc_now().isoformat(),\n                },\n            ),\n        )\n\n    async def read_group(\n        self,\n        *,\n        queues: list[str],\n        consumer_name: str,\n        count: int,\n        block_ms: int,\n    ) -> list[StreamMessage]:\n        streams = {stream_name(queue): \">\" for queue in queues}\n        response = await self._redis.xreadgroup(\n            groupname=REDACTED,\n            consumername=REDACTED,\n            streams=REDACTED,\n            count=REDACTED,\n            block=REDACTED,\n        )\n        return self._normalize_messages(response)\n\n    async def reclaim(\n        self,\n        *,\n        queues: list[str],\n        consumer_name: str,\n        min_idle_time_ms: int,\n        count: int,\n    ) -> list[StreamMessage]:\n        reclaimed: list[StreamMessage] = []\n        for queue in queues:\n            name = stream_name(queue)\n            try:\n                response = await self._redis.xautoclaim(\n                    name=REDACTED,\n                    groupname=REDACTED,\n                    consumername=REDACTED,\n                    min_idle_time=REDACTED,\n                    start_id=REDACTED\"0-0\",\n                    count=REDACTED,\n                )\n            except TypeError:\n                pending = await self._redis.xpending_range(\n                    name,\n                    self._group_name,\n                    \"-\",\n                    \"+\",\n                    count,\n                    consumername=None,\n                )\n                ids = [item[\"message_id\"] for item in pending if item[\"idle\"] >= min_idle_time_ms]\n                if not ids:\n                    continue\n                claimed = await self._redis.xclaim(  # type: ignore[no-untyped-call]\n                    name,\n                    self._group_name,\n                    consumer_name,\n                    min_idle_time_ms,\n                    ids,\n                )\n                reclaimed.extend(\n                    self._normalize_messages(\n                        [\n                            (\n                                name,\n                                claimed,\n                            )\n                        ]\n                    )\n                )\n                continue\n            if isinstance(response, (tuple, list)) and len(response) >= 2:\n                messages = response[1]\n                reclaimed.extend(self._normalize_messages([(name, messages)]))\n        return reclaimed\n\n    async def ack(self, *, queue: str, stream_id: str) -> int:\n        return int(\n            await self._redis.xack(  # type: ignore[no-untyped-call]\n                stream_name(queue), self._group_name, stream_id\n            )\n        )\n\n    async def close(self) -> None:\n        async_close = getattr(self._redis, \"aclose\", None)\n        if async_close is not None:\n            await cast(Callable[..., Awaitable[None]], async_close)()\n            return\n        close_method = cast(Callable[..., Awaitable[None]], self._redis.close)\n        await close_method()\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def _normalize_messages(response: Any) -> list[StreamMessage]:\n        normalized: list[StreamMessage] = []\n        for raw_stream, entries in response or []:\n            stream = raw_stream.decode() if isinstance(raw_stream, bytes) else raw_stream\n            queue = stream.split(\":\", 1)[1]\n            for raw_id, raw_values in entries:\n                stream_id = raw_id.decode() if isinstance(raw_id, bytes) else raw_id\n                values: dict[str, str] = {}\n                for key, value in raw_values.items():\n                    parsed_key = key.decode() if isinstance(key, bytes) else str(key)\n                    parsed_value = value.decode() if isinstance(value, bytes) else str(value)\n                    values[parsed_key] = parsed_value\n                normalized.append(\n                    StreamMessage(\n                        queue=REDACTED,\n                        stream=REDACTED,\n                        stream_id=REDACTED,\n                        values=REDACTED,\n                    )\n                )\n        return normalized\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },

        {

        },
        {

        },

        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Test package.\"\"\"\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },

        {
